moments.title: Wimbledon begins today
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships start today and run for two weeks of grass-court tennis at SW19

angles.name: London's tennis pride
angles.copy: The wait is over, Wimbledon is back: two weeks of aces, volleys, and strawberries and cream — London's summer just got a whole lot more exciting

angles.name: Tennis fever
angles.copy: Tennis fever hits the UK as Wimbledon begins today: who will be this year's champions?

angles.name: Grass court glory
angles.copy: The grass is cut, the courts are ready: Wimbledon starts today and the world of tennis is watching

moments.title: British Grand Prix approaches
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is just around the corner, on July 5th

angles.name: Racing towards Silverstone
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just a week away: who will take the chequered flag at Silverstone?

angles.name: F1 summer
angles.copy: Summer just got a whole lot faster: the British Grand Prix is coming to Silverstone on July 5th

angles.name: Silverstone countdown
angles.copy: The countdown begins: just six days until the British Grand Prix at Silverstone

moments.title: The Open Championship nears
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is held at Royal Birkdale from July 16th to 19th

angles.name: Golf's biggest stage
angles.copy: The Open Championship is just around the corner: the world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale

angles.name: Royal Birkdale awaits
angles.copy: The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale: who will lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golfing glory
angles.copy: The Open Championship is the pinnacle of golf: Royal Birkdale hosts the 154th edition from July 16th

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show approaches
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, the biggest agricultural show in Europe, runs from July 20th to 23rd

angles.name: Welsh countryside showcase
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is just around the corner: a celebration of Welsh farming and countryside

angles.name: Agricultural extravaganza
angles.copy: The biggest agricultural show in Europe is coming to Llanelwedd: don't miss the Royal Welsh Show

angles.name: Rural Wales on display
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a showcase of rural Wales: farming, food, and fun for all the family
